system.description:
*magical*, Value 1

This heavy, black metal torc is set with a red gem. It feels good upon your wrist. Makes you feel important.

When you **_wear the torc and threaten_** **_someone that you consider beneath you_**, lose HP equal to the torc’s current Cost (1d4 to start). They are filled with fear; the craven will flee, cower, or grovel, and even the brave will flinch and hesitate. Each time you use the torc, the Cost increases by 1 die size (max 1d10).

When you **_wear the torc for a week without_** **_anyone questioning your authority_**, decrease the Cost by one step (min 1d4).

*An artifact of the wider world — see @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.Qir4rs4BUipTSyFQ]{Barrow Builders}.*
